page_content:
Chemistry Major Courses

Fall Freshman Year (15 or 16 Credits)

Spring Freshman Year (15 Credits)

CHEM 146 (3 credits) Principles of General Chemistry

Prerequisite: Must have math eligibility of MATH140 or higher. Corequisite: CHEM177. Three hours of lecture and one hour of discussion per week. The Periodic Table, inorganic substances, ionic and covalent bonding, bulk properties of materials, chemical equilibrium, and quantitative chemistry.
